# TokenAdvisor - Full Reference

> Real-time AI token usage and cost tracking system
> Built by BuiltByBas (builtbybas.com)

## Overview

TokenAdvisor is a standalone full-stack application that sits between your applications and AI API providers. It captures every API call, calculates costs in real time using model-specific pricing, validates its own accuracy continuously, and reconciles against actual provider billing to ensure zero discrepancies.

## Supported Providers

- Anthropic (Claude models: Haiku, Sonnet, Opus)
- OpenAI (GPT models, o-series, embedding models)
- Google AI (Gemini models)
- Extensible for future providers

## System Architecture

### Layer 1: API Integration
Captures every outbound API request with full metadata including model, version, timestamp, and token counts (input, output, cache creation, cache read).

### Layer 2: Cost Calculation Engine
Applies accurate, model-specific pricing to every call in real time. Supports versioned pricing tables, dynamic updates, and batch API pricing differences.

### Layer 3: Validation & Reconciliation
Continuously verifies calculations against provider-reported usage. Per-call validation, 15-minute micro-reconciliation, daily reconciliation, and monthly invoice matching.

### Layer 4: Dashboard
Real-time display of token counts, costs, model breakdowns, project breakdowns, validation status, and historical trends.

## Edge Cases Handled

- Pricing changes (versioned, non-retroactive)
- Cached tokens (different rates for cache read vs creation)
- System-injected tokens
- Model version changes
- Streaming responses
- Batch API pricing
- Rate limiting and failed calls

## Tech Stack

Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, Auth.js v5, Zod v4, Recharts, Vitest
